'''Olzal Erne''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Chief Petty Officer/Legends|Chief Petty Officer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

He served as second-watch chief for the [[Starboard Heavy Blaster Station]] on the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-class Star Destroyer]] [[Steel Talon/Legends|''Steel Talon'']] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1st}}
